title: Define campaign variants
instruction: Read the campaign brief, identify goal, audience, offer, deadline, call to action, and confirm required variants by language, segment, lifecycle stage, or region.

title: Draft localized emails
instruction: Draft the primary English email with subject, preview text, body, and CTA; adjust tone; remove vague or overpromising language; and translate or localize into the requested languages while preserving intent.

title: Validate compliance assets
instruction: Check unsubscribe note, claims, privacy-sensitive wording, required disclaimers, generate 3 subject line options and 2 preview text options per language, and build a plain-text version for each variant.

title: Queue campaign summary
instruction: Mock-send or queue the campaign through MOCK_EMAIL_API and return the campaign summary, email variants, subject lines, preview text, plain-text versions, compliance notes, mock send result, send settings, risks, and approval needs.
